description: Record that a Capability is a step of a Flow (PART_OF_FLOW), with its position (`step_order`). A step without one is listed after the ordered steps, and `flow_report` says so rather than inventing an order.

step_order.description:
Position of this capability within the flow. Steps without one are
listed after the ordered ones, and the flow report says so.

name: part_of_flow
